name: Karthik Unni
bio: Computer Science student, AI enthusiast, and open-source builder from Kerala. I build machine learning systems, full-stack applications, developer tools, and open-source projects. Creator of KL Dev-Ring, an initiative to connect and showcase Kerala's developer community.

projects.name: KL Dev-Ring
projects.description: A community-driven network connecting developers, builders, researchers, founders, and open-source contributors across Kerala.
